headline: Decide how new tips should reach you
subtext: The notifications step helps recipients choose whether email alerts fit their review workflow before they share a public tip line.
image_alt_text: Hush Line social graphic showing a mobile onboarding notifications screen with settings for email alerts and encrypted message delivery.

social.bluesky:
Before sharing a tip line, recipients need a clear alert plan.

Hush Line's onboarding notification step helps a newsroom, law office, classroom, or small intake team decide how new-message alerts fit their review workflow.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.
social.linkedin:
Before a public tip line is shared, the people receiving messages need to know how they will notice new intake.

Hush Line's onboarding notification step lets a recipient decide whether email alerts belong in their workflow while keeping the web inbox available for review. For a newsroom, law office, classroom, or small intake team, that decision is part of getting the channel ready before sources use it.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.
social.mastodon:
Before a tip line is shared, recipients need to know how they will notice new intake.

Hush Line's onboarding notification step helps a newsroom, law office, classroom, or small intake team decide whether email alerts fit the workflow while the web inbox stays available for review.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.

rationale: Chose the recipient-shared onboarding notifications screenshot because the directory candidate repeats a directory theme used two days earlier and several times in the prior 31 days. This post uses a narrower setup angle focused on deciding whether email alerts belong in the recipient workflow before publishing a tip line, while avoiding admin framing, dark mode, and PR-based recency claims.
copy_brief: Write for recipients and staff using Hush Line day to day, not for platform admins.

matched_pull_requests.title: Avoid per-recipient server-side encryption fallback for field notifications

title: Onboarding - Step 3 Notifications (newman)
